title: Phantom Armor (Invisible Armor)
description: Craft strong & invisible Phantom Armor out of Phantom Membranes
body:
# Phantom Armor
Craft Strong & Invisible Armor out of Phantom Membranes! ![Phantom Chestplate Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58cd1a7fabed7d37c7835f814800835ec01b08bc.png) It is a bit stronger than Iron Armor, but can not be enchanted. It has no visible Model. Phantom Armor can be repaired inside an Anvil with Phantom Membranes. ![Phantom Armor Equipped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d88d3d0c1990ffe73fe1f6ac068c20159df6220b.png) _Equipped Phantom Armor + Invisibility Potion_ ## 🛠️ Installation ### Datapack Installation Guide Copy the .zip archive into the ".minecraft/saves/__yourworldname__/datapacks" folder, where __yourworldname__ is the name of your world. ### Mod installation Guide Copy the .jar archive into the folder your Mod Loader of choice provides.
